info.title: PGManage API
info.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for PG accommodation management in India

post.description:
Sign up a new PG owner.

Creates:
1. Organisation row in public schema (is_active=False, approved_at=NULL — pending approval)
2. Org-specific PostgreSQL schema with all tables
3. Owner user in the org schema
4. 30-day Growth trial

The user must be approved by the platform admin before they can log in.
A signed-link email is sent to ADMIN_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL.
Send OTP to phone via WhatsApp. Rate-limited by middleware.

Always returns 200 (don't leak account existence). Sends a reset email
only if we find a matching user. Token is a JWT signed with SECRET_KEY,
expires in 1 hour.

post.summary: Set a new password using a reset token
Invite staff member via WhatsApp OTP

post.description:
Owner creates a manager with an initial password set by the owner.
Manager logs in via email + password just like the owner does.

get.description:
One-click endpoint linked from the email sent at signup. Verifies the signed
JWT (HS256, 7-day expiry) and either:
  - action=approve → marks org is_active=true, approved_at=NOW
  - action=reject  → drops the org schema and removes the org row
Returns a tiny inline HTML page so it works straight from email clients.
List properties with occupancy stats embedded for the dashboard cards.

get.summary: List all vacant beds (+ upcoming vacancies)
get.description:
Returns currently-vacant beds AND (by default) upcoming vacancies — beds
currently OCCUPIED by a tenant with an `expected_move_out_date` falling
within the next ``upcoming_within_days`` days.

Each row carries an ``available_from`` date and ``status`` ∈
{"VACANT", "UPCOMING"} so the UI can render them in one chronological list.

delete.summary: Delete a floor (only if it has no rooms)
Delete a room (only if no occupied beds)

get.summary: Compute the fiscal period for a (property, month, year)

put.summary: Set or update the close date for a (month, year). Pass null close_date to clear.

delete.summary: Clear the per-month override (fall back to settlement_day)

patch.summary: Block / unblock a bed (single-occupancy holds etc.)

get.description:
Sorted by floor → room → bed by default ('room' sort_by) so the list mirrors
the physical layout of the building. Pass sort_by=name or =move_in to override.

post.description:
For tenants already checked out: record (or top up) the deposit refund as a
REFUND payment row. Multiple calls append more rows — they don't overwrite,
so the partner can split a refund across days/modes if needed.

Accepts an image (jpg/png/webp/heic) or a PDF. Images are compressed to
JPEG (max 1600px wide, q85). PDFs are stored as-is. Stored under
/app/uploads/{org_id}/tenants/{tenant_id}.{ext}.

get.summary: Download sample CSV for tenant bulk import

post.summary: Bulk import tenants from a CSV file
post.description:
Each row creates a tenant + an active rent plan and assigns the named bed.
Required columns: name, phone, id_type, id_number, emergency_contact_name,
                 emergency_contact_phone, emergency_contact_relation,
                 bed_label, room_number, floor_name, move_in_date, monthly_rent.
Optional: email, security_deposit, advance_paid, billing_day.

post.description:
Accepts an image (jpg/png/heic etc.). Compresses to JPEG max 1600px wide
at quality 85. Stores under /app/uploads/{org_id}/{expense_id}.jpg.
Backed up offsite by the nightly backup.sh.

Returns the org's website-lead integration config for the
Settings → Website Integration page: the public site token, the webhook URL
to POST to, the configured CORS allowlist, and a ready-to-paste JS snippet.

post.description:
Receives leads from Meta Lead Ads.
Each org configures their own Meta webhook with their org_slug as a query param.

get.description: Meta calls this once with hub.challenge to verify the webhook URL.

post.description:
Inbound WhatsApp messages. Routes by phone_number_id (which property's number
received it) via public.whatsapp_routing, then classifies intent and acts.

BedStatusUpdate.title: BedStatusUpdate
BedStatusUpdate.description:
Block/unblock a bed.

Valid transitions:
  VACANT      -> RESERVED | MAINTENANCE
  RESERVED    -> VACANT | MAINTENANCE
  MAINTENANCE -> VACANT | RESERVED
OCCUPIED beds can't be changed here — check out the tenant first.

RefundUpdate.title: RefundUpdate
RefundUpdate.description: Payload to record (or correct) a refund after the tenant has checked out.

WebsiteLeadIn.title: WebsiteLeadIn
WebsiteLeadIn.description:
Payload from a PG owner's website booking form. Wire format is camelCase
(roomType/moveInDate/propertyId); we expose snake_case internally via aliases.
